notableEvents.label: Luis Campusano plunked
notableEvents.detail: Luis Campusano hit by pitch. Nick Castellanos to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Nick Castellanos scores. Luis Campusano scores. Sung-Mun Song to 3rd. Sung-Mun Song advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds into a double play, second baseman Casey Schmitt to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Miguel Andujar out at 2nd. Gavin Sheets out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song steals (1) 2nd base. Sung-Mun Song to 3rd. Sung-Mun Song advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Jesus Rodriguez.

notableEvents.label: Balk run(s)
notableEvents.detail: With Miguel Andujar batting, Jackson Merrill scores on a balk.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
